scripts.build: npm run build -w @codex-phone/shared && npm run build -w @codex-phone/codex-bridge && npm run build -w @codex-phone/mobile-pwa
scripts.test: npm run test -w @codex-phone/shared && npm run test -w @codex-phone/codex-bridge && npm run test -w @codex-phone/mobile-pwa
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @codex-phone/codex-bridge && npm run lint -w @codex-phone/mobile-pwa
